section.heading: Termination

content.p: The program under this part shall terminate at the end of the second full fiscal year after the date that the Administrator establishes the program under this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 85–699, title III, § 398, as added Pub. L. 110–140, title XII, § 1207, Dec. 19, 2007, 121 Stat. 1783.)
